title: The Unexpected Roommate
content:
Lin Yu was a college student who had just moved into a new apartment. He was excited about living alone for the first time, but his excitement quickly turned to shock when he met his new roommate.

"Hi! I'm Su Xiaoxiao!" the girl said, bouncing into the apartment.

Lin Yu stared at her, his eyes wide. She was small and cute, with long black hair and a bright smile. She was wearing a pink dress and carrying a pile of stuffed animals.

"Um... hi," Lin Yu said. "I'm Lin Yu."

Su Xiaoxiao smiled. "Nice to meet you, Lin Yu! I'm your new roommate!"

Lin Yu's heart raced. He had thought he was getting the apartment to himself, but now he had a roommate - a cute, energetic girl.

"Wait," Lin Yu said. "I didn't know I was getting a roommate."

Su Xiaoxiao shrugged. "The landlord told me that you needed a roommate to help with the rent."

Lin Yu sighed. He had been struggling with money, so he had agreed to take a roommate, but he had expected it to be a guy.

"Okay," Lin Yu said. "Welcome."

***

Su Xiaoxiao spent the next few hours unpacking her things. She filled the apartment with stuffed animals, posters of cute cats, and all sorts of colorful decorations.

Lin Yu watched her, amused. She was so energetic and happy, and he couldn't help but smile.

"Lin Yu," Su Xiaoxiao said, turning to him. "Do you want to help me decorate?"

Lin Yu shook his head. "I'm good, thanks."

Su Xiaoxiao pouted. "Aw, come on! It'll be fun!"

Lin Yu hesitated, then nodded. "Okay, fine."

They spent the next hour decorating the apartment, laughing and joking. Lin Yu found himself enjoying Su Xiaoxiao's company.

***

That night, Lin Yu couldn't sleep. He kept thinking about Su Xiaoxiao - her smile, her laughter, her cute little nose.

He knew that having a female roommate could be complicated, but he also knew that he was lucky to have such a nice person living with him.

The next morning, Lin Yu woke up to the smell of pancakes.

"Good morning, Lin Yu!" Su Xiaoxiao said, standing in the kitchen.

She was wearing a cute apron, and there was flour on her cheek.

"I made breakfast!"

Lin Yu walked into the kitchen, his eyes wide. There were pancakes, eggs, and bacon on the table.

"You made all this?"

Su Xiaoxiao nodded. "Yep! I love cooking!"

Lin Yu sat down and took a bite of the pancake. It was delicious.

"Wow, this is amazing," Lin Yu said.

Su Xiaoxiao smiled. "Thanks! I'm glad you like it!"

As they ate breakfast, Lin Yu knew that his life was about to change. Having Su Xiaoxiao as a roommate would be an adventure, and he was ready for it.
